name: We are All Going to Die #4012

sheet.background_story:
Thia Hoimion was a healer cleric, devoted to her deity and skilled in herbalism. She travels to witness The Pyre's burning, eager to deepen her understanding of her faith. Her curiosity has been sparked by the stories of Mother Agora and The Nameless Serpent forming a unity, and she hopes to learn more about the mysteries of her deity. Thia's kind and patient nature, as well as her strong faith in healing, have guided her on this journey.

As she arrives, she forsakes her name.
She is now ready to return to oneness.
